tasks.label: Build esp32 (container)
tasks.detail: ESP32 WROOM-32 (MVP target). Run inside the dev container.

tasks.label: Build esp32s3 (container)
tasks.detail: ESP32-S3 WROOM-1 N16R8 (full-feature target). Run inside the dev container.

tasks.label: Reconfigure (container)
tasks.detail: Regenerate sdkconfig from defaults for the currently set target.

tasks.label: Flash esp32 (host)
tasks.command: tools/.venv/bin/esptool --chip esp32 --port ${input:serialPort} --baud 460800 write_flash --flash_mode dio --flash_freq 40m --flash_size 4MB 0x1000 build/bootloader/bootloader.bin 0x8000 build/partition_table/partition-table.bin 0x10000 build/midictrl.bin
tasks.detail: ESP32 WROOM. Bootloader at 0x1000 (classic ESP32). Run on the macOS host.

tasks.label: Flash esp32s3 (host)
tasks.command: tools/.venv/bin/esptool --chip esp32s3 --port ${input:serialPort} --baud 460800 write_flash --flash_mode dio --flash_freq 80m --flash_size 16MB 0x0 build/bootloader/bootloader.bin 0x8000 build/partition_table/partition-table.bin 0x10000 build/midictrl.bin
tasks.detail: ESP32-S3. Bootloader at 0x0. Run on the macOS host.
